evals.prompt: Create a reusable sandbox that lets an agent emit whitelisted HTML widgets, renders them in an isolated iframe, and sends clicked actions back to the host app.
evals.expected_output: Loads generative-ui, locks the design contract first, chooses a standalone HTML contract with sandboxing and a typed host bridge, and calls out sanitization and fallback behavior.
evals.notes: Baseline today is likely `website-building/webapp`, which lacks dedicated renderer-boundary and sandbox guidance.

evals.prompt: Design a React architecture where the model can choose among cards, forms, charts, and action panels without being allowed to hallucinate props or trigger side effects directly.
evals.expected_output: Loads generative-ui, chooses a typed component-schema contract, validates payloads, and keeps actions and privileged effects host-owned.
evals.notes: Baseline today is likely `using-reasoning` for architecture-only advice.

evals.prompt: Build a support copilot UI that streams form suggestions, follow-up questions, and action cards into the chat as the model thinks.
evals.expected_output: Loads generative-ui, treats the work as streamed UI, defines skeleton and partial-failure behavior, and avoids collapsing the problem into a generic webapp build.
evals.notes: Baseline today is likely `website-building/webapp`, which focuses on a fullstack product template rather than stream protocol design.
